name: Prince
bio: Prince's catalog still earns at a high level because songwriting, production authorship, and one of pop's strongest songbooks keep the recordings valuable across streaming and licensing.
notable_for: Writer-performer ownership value and one of the deepest premium pop catalogs ever made.
career_highlight: Purple Rain remains one of the most durable soundtrack-linked albums in music history.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Prince's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Prince's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
